element.hint: Easing function for animations (e.g., cubicOut, linear, elasticOut)
element.label: Animation Easing
element.name: animation_easing

element.hint: The chart type to render for this metric
element.label: Visualization Type
element.name: viz_type

element.hint: Border color of the chart container (CSS color value)
element.label: Border Color
element.name: border_color

element.hint: Enable or disable entrance animations when the chart first renders
element.label: Animate
element.name: animate

element.hint: A unique name to identify this visualization configuration
element.label: Name
element.name: name

element.hint: Color palette name or comma-separated hex values for data series
element.label: Color Scheme
element.name: color_scheme

element.hint: Allow clicking legend items to toggle data series visibility
element.label: Legend Interactive
element.name: legend_interactive

element.hint: Right margin inside the chart container in pixels
element.label: Margin Right
element.name: margin_right

element.hint: CSS height of the visualization container (e.g., 400px, 50vh)
element.label: Height
element.name: component_height

element.hint: Duration of entrance animation in milliseconds
element.label: Animation Duration (ms)
element.name: animation_duration

element.hint: Background color of the chart container (CSS color value or transparent)
element.label: Background Color
element.name: background_color

element.hint: Border width around the chart container in pixels
element.label: Border Width
element.name: border_width

element.hint: Position of the legend relative to the chart (top, bottom, left, right)
element.label: Legend Position
element.name: legend_position

element.hint: Show or hide the chart legend
element.label: Show Legend
element.name: legend_show

element.hint: Bottom margin inside the chart container in pixels
element.label: Margin Bottom
element.name: margin_bottom

element.hint: Font size for legend text in pixels
element.label: Legend Font Size
element.name: legend_font_size

element.hint: Top margin inside the chart container in pixels
element.label: Margin Top
element.name: margin_top

element.hint: Highlight data elements when the user hovers over them
element.label: Hover Highlight
element.name: hover_highlight

element.hint: CSS width of the visualization container (e.g., 100%, 600px)
element.label: Width
element.name: component_width

element.hint: Left margin inside the chart container in pixels
element.label: Margin Left
element.name: margin_left

element.hint: Corner rounding of the chart container in pixels
element.label: Border Radius
element.name: border_radius

element.hint: Show tooltips on hover over data points
element.label: Show Tooltip
element.name: tooltip_show
